57570.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
57570.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! IT'S WHAT IT SAYS ON THE TIN! You're welcome!

57571.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
57571.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

57572.title: Top 50 Classics That Made MTV!
57572.description: Back in the day, MTV was filling our screens with some iconic music videos, which is why we're playing 50 of the best classics that made MTV great!

57573.title: Forever 80s
57573.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

57574.title: The Power Of 80s Love!
57574.description: The power of love is strong here at MTV which is why we've put all of the best 80s love songs together in one playlist!

57575.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
57575.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV!

57576.title: ... So 80s!
57576.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
